overall.description: First-person exploration through a dark cyberpunk industrial facility (Cyberpunk 2077). The player character moves through security checkpoints, ascends metal stairs, and traverses elevated walkways past control rooms, characterized by red emergency lighting, steam vents, and corporate Arasaka branding.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint with glass booths and red emergency lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through industrial security checkpoint area with glass booths on either side

entered.detail: glass-walled security booth with red interior lighting and metal framing
matching security booth opposite the first, with visible equipment inside
pulsing red warning lights mounted on industrial structures in the background
steam or smoke rising from vents in the industrial floor
white and red striped safety markings on the dark concrete floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit industrial security checkpoint. Two glass-walled security booths with red interior lighting flank the path. Red emergency beacons pulse in the background while steam rises from floor vents. The player walks forward on concrete flooring marked with safety stripes.

scene_state.functional_zone: metal staircase and elevated grated walkway

events.description: begins ascending metal staircase from ground level to upper platform
reaches top of stairs and transitions to elevated metal catwalk walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing metal stairs with grated steps and proceeding along elevated industrial catwalk

entered.detail: steep metal staircase with diamond-plate grating and safety railings
elevated walkway with metal grating floor allowing view to level below
metal pipe railings along the left side of the walkway
metal pipe railings along the right side of the walkway
long white fluorescent light fixture mounted on the wall
large circular corporate logo with stylized design on the far wall

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a steep metal staircase with grated steps, transitioning from the ground floor to an elevated catwalk. The environment features industrial safety railings and fluorescent tube lighting. The Arasaka corporate logo becomes visible on the far wall as the player proceeds along the grated walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway adjacent to lit control room

events.description: approaching control room windows with bright cyan interior lighting becomes visible

agents.ego_description: walking past large control room windows revealing interior office space with computer equipment

entered.detail: large glass windows revealing a lit interior control room with desks and monitors
large industrial pipes running along the walls and ceiling

segments.scene_description: Walking along the elevated catwalk, the player passes large windows revealing a brightly lit control room interior. The Arasaka logo is now prominent on the left wall. Industrial piping runs along the corridor while the metal grating continues underfoot.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial machinery room with red lighting

events.description: entering larger industrial chamber containing machinery and equipment

agents.ego_description: moving through industrial equipment bay with red-lit machinery and overhead pipes

entered.detail: large industrial equipment and machinery with dark metal housing
machinery console illuminated with red emergency lighting
large ventilation ducts and pipes running across the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player enters a larger industrial chamber filled with machinery and equipment. Red emergency lighting illuminates consoles in the distance while large ventilation pipes run overhead. The metal catwalk continues through this equipment bay, with industrial machinery visible on the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person progression from a claustrophobic security checkpoint into a vast, machinery-filled industrial chamber. It begins on a concrete floor marked with safety stripes, moving between glass-walled security booths illuminated by pulsing red emergency beacons and rising steam. As the camera ascends a steep metal staircase with grated steps, the environment shifts from the ground floor to an elevated catwalk under fluorescent tube lighting where the Arasaka corporate logo first appears on the far wall. The scene then expands along the walkway, passing large windows that reveal a brightly lit control room and industrial piping before the path opens into a larger equipment bay. Finally, the camera glides through this expansive chamber, passing heavy machinery and overhead ventilation pipes under the glow of distant red consoles.
